name: Dilled Bean Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and pack whole beans into hot, sterilized jars.
2. To each jar, add 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes, 1 clove garlic, and 1 head of dill.
3. Heat the water, salt, and vinegar until boiling.
4. Pour the boiling mixture over the beans in the jars.
5. Seal the jars immediately.
6. Makes 4 pints.
